_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 15 primary_outcome categories used in backed_clinical_studies.primary_outcome. NOTE: source-data values are still human-readable strings (e.g. 'Reduce Stress/Anxiety') from the V1 schema. This vocab provides snake_case canonical IDs and round-trip mapping via legacy_display. A future v1.1 migration will canonicalize the source-data field to use snake_case IDs.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for primary-outcome labels. Surfaced as evidence-grouping chips on the product detail screen.
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/backed_clinical_studies.json `primary_outcome` field (197 entries; legacy human-readable values still in use).

field_contract.name: User-facing label (sentence case).
field_contract.legacy_display: The legacy human-readable string currently in source data. Use for round-trip lookup until v1.1 migration.
field_contract.related_user_goal_id: Optional. The corresponding user_goals_vocab ID (e.g. GOAL_SLEEP_QUALITY).

_metadata.v1_1_followup: Migrate backed_clinical_studies.primary_outcome from human-readable strings to snake_case IDs. Update enricher emitters.

primary_outcomes.name: Blood Sugar Support
primary_outcomes.notes: Glycemic control outcomes — fasting glucose, HbA1c, insulin sensitivity.

primary_outcomes.name: Cardiovascular/Heart Health
primary_outcomes.notes: Heart, vessel, and lipid outcomes — blood pressure, lipid panel, vascular function.

primary_outcomes.name: Digestive Health
primary_outcomes.notes: GI symptoms, gut motility, microbiome diversity, barrier function.

primary_outcomes.name: Eye & Vision
primary_outcomes.notes: Macular pigment, dry-eye symptoms, age-related vision changes.

primary_outcomes.name: Healthy Aging/Longevity
primary_outcomes.notes: Cellular and metabolic resilience over time, healthspan markers.

primary_outcomes.name: Hormone Balance
primary_outcomes.notes: Endocrine outcomes — thyroid, sex hormones, cortisol modulation.

primary_outcomes.name: Immune Support
primary_outcomes.notes: Immune-cell function, infection-duration reduction, vaccine response.

primary_outcomes.name: Increase Energy
primary_outcomes.notes: Fatigue reduction, daytime stamina, mitochondrial energy markers.

primary_outcomes.name: Joint & Bone Health
primary_outcomes.notes: Joint comfort, range of motion, cartilage health, bone density.

primary_outcomes.name: Muscle Growth & Recovery
primary_outcomes.notes: Training adaptation, recovery, lean mass, strength outcomes.

primary_outcomes.name: Reduce Stress/Anxiety
primary_outcomes.notes: Stress reactivity, perceived stress, anxiety-scale outcomes.

primary_outcomes.name: Skin, Hair & Nails
primary_outcomes.notes: Skin elasticity, hydration, hair density, nail strength.

primary_outcomes.name: Sleep Quality
primary_outcomes.notes: Sleep onset, depth, duration, sleep-quality questionnaires.

primary_outcomes.name: Weight Management
primary_outcomes.notes: Body composition, weight loss/maintenance, waist circumference.
